answer:
We differentiate under the integral:  
\( H'(z) = \int_0^1 \frac{\partial}{\partial z} e^{-z^2 t^2} \, dt = \int_0^1 (-2z t^2) e^{-z^2 t^2} \, dt \).  
At \( z = 1 \), this becomes \( H'(1) = -2 \int_0^1 t^2 e^{-t^2} dt \).  
Evaluating numerically gives approximately \(-0.3789\).

\boxed{C}
